matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CRP acute-phase inflammatory biomarker review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response and Inflammation biomarker context, Cardiometabolic association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs1205 (CRP 3'UTR marker) dosage suggests this sample carries the CRP prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a CRP acute-phase inflammatory biomarker review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response and Inflammation biomarker context, Cardiometabolic association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as CRP level association marker. rs1205 (CRP 3'UTR marker) is curated as a CRP marker for Inflammation biomarker context, Cardiometabolic association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs1205 (CRP 3'UTR marker) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the CRP prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found
cases.prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CRP acute-phase inflammatory biomarker review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response and Inflammation biomarker context, Cardiometabolic association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. An observed CRP variant places this sample in the curated CRP research context. The local CRP bundle is acute-phase inflammatory biomarker review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls. CRP variants can alter or tag acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
cases.rationale: This is the base thesis that activates as soon as any promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
cases.prediction: When a CRP variant is paired with high methylation in the whitelist mean beta, the sample best fits a combined regulatory-context thesis. This pattern leans toward stronger regulatory restraint or reduced local accessibility around the locus. The variant side of the thesis is: The variant observed in this sample suggests a CRP acute-phase inflammatory biomarker review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response and Inflammation biomarker context, Cardiometabolic association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. CRP methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a acute-phase inflammation, complement engagement, pentraxin biology, cardiometabolic biomarker context, and hepatic IL-6 response gene.
